metadata.description: Marketplace privado do Pedro: skills, plugins e automações pessoais — bootstrap, visual, rev6, handoff, improve, ship, project-doc.

plugins.name: bootstrap-third-party
plugins.description: Auto-sync third-party Claude Code marketplaces + plugins across machines via git hooks

plugins.name: visual
plugins.description: CLI walls-of-text → interactive HTML dark-theme views. Plans, diagnostics, and decisions rendered in the browser with live sync back to Claude via local daemon.

plugins.name: rev6
plugins.description: Multi-angle code review via 6 parallel voltagent specialists (architect, backend, frontend, fullstack, code-reviewer, UX). Consolidates findings with P0/P1 highlighting.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Session continuity cycle — creates a complete knowledge transfer document at {project_root}/.claude/HANDOFF.md at the end of a session, and loads it back on the next session (via 'continue' / '/continue') to resume exactly where you left off.

plugins.name: improve
plugins.description: Generic self-improvement implementer using the autoresearch ML methodology. Reads the app's IMPROVEMENT_PROGRAM.md, fetches proposals from GitHub Issues (label 'autoresearch'), implements changes.

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Production deploy flow: lint, type-check, commit, push, deploy in one disciplined sequence. Triggers on 'ship', 'manda', 'deploya tudo'.

plugins.name: project-doc
plugins.description: Auto-generate a structured CLAUDE.md reference block for a project (stack, ports, env vars, deploy flow, DB, gotchas). Supports standard and monorepo layouts with post-generation verification checks.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Relentless one-question-at-a-time design review. Stress-tests plans and decisions by walking every branch of the decision tree.

plugins.name: grill-with-docs
plugins.description: Relentless design review that challenges plans against the project's domain model, sharpens terminology, and updates CONTEXT.md and ADRs inline as decisions crystallise.

plugins.name: sovai
plugins.description: Autonomous execution mode — executes any plan to completion without user interruptions, checkpoints, or confirmations. Applies workarounds when blocked, logs all decisions, and delivers a structured report at the end.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Audits implementation against a plan using 4 parallel specialist agents. Loops via /goal until 100% adherent.

plugins.name: principles
plugins.description: Contextual system design principles for planning and review

plugins.name: context-guard
plugins.description: Auto-interrupts workflow when context window exceeds configurable threshold. Bridges statusLine (context data) and PostToolUse hooks (execution blocking) via temp file.
